__meta__.method: Per-match crowd asymmetry (manual input). delta-goals derived via the ghost-game home-advantage anchor (crowd share of home advantage ~1/3-1/2 of ~0.35 goals; 3:1 partisan majority ~ a normal home crowd's tilt). DISPLAY LAYER ONLY - never feeds the model, scoring, or bracket. See docs/CROWD_ANALYSIS.md.

Spain__vs__Argentina.source: reported supporter ticket allocation for the final
